rest_open_hour.description: Library open hour, event, or exception.

open_hour.description: Library open hour, event, or exception.

type.description: Calendar record type. Standard opening hour, event or exception. Possible values are listed in 'CalendarRecordsTypes' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

inherited.description: False means that it is a change in the library scope.

recurrence_type.description: Recurrence type. WEEKLY, YEARLY. Possible values are listed in 'RecurrenceType' [code-table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

day_of_week.description: Day of week. SUNDAY, MONDAY, ... SATURDAY. Possible values are listed in 'DaysOfWeek' code table.

status.description: Calendar record status. OPEN or CLOSED. Possible values are listed in 'CalendarRecordStatuses' code-table.
